name: Yunnan Yuntou Ecology and Environment Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Yunnan Yuntou Ecology and Environment Technology Co., Ltd. engages in green, general contracting, environmental services, and investment businesses in China. The company is involved in the provision of engineering services, including design, construction, and maintenance services; and nursery, flower cultivation, and landscape businesses. It also undertakes the construction of urban roads and environmental facilities, infrastructure projects, urban special environmental management projects, etc.; and rural and scenic ecological environment construction projects. In addition, the company offers environmental consulting, management, professional construction, and ecological repair integrated services; water supply, sewage treatment, solid waste treatment, and hazardous waste disposal services; lake watershed management and soil remediation services; and environmental monitoring and testing services. Further, it engages in fund and industrial project investment activities. The company was formerly known as Yunnan Green-Land Biological Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yunnan Yuntou Ecology and Environment Technology Co., Ltd. in August 2014. Yunnan Yuntou Ecology and Environment Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Kunming, China.
